description_long: This is a classic white baseball with two prominent curved seams stitched in red thread, forming a figure-eight pattern around its surface. The ball's exterior is made of smooth, slightly matte leather, with visible scuff marks and minor discoloration indicating use. The red stitching is evenly spaced and tightly sewn, providing both structural integrity and grip. No brand logos, league markings, or manufacturer names are visible on the surface. The ball is spherical and compact, typical of those used in professional and amateur baseball games. Its size and construction suggest it is designed for throwing, catching, and hitting in urban parks, sports fields, or recreational areas.
description: A white leather baseball with red figure-eight stitching and visible scuff marks, showing signs of use. No logos or markings are present.
description_view_0: The baseball is shown with a clear view of the red stitching curving across the white surface, with some scuff marks visible near the center.
description_view_1: This view highlights the seam running horizontally, with more pronounced discoloration and wear on the upper left side.
description_view_2: The top seam is visible, with subtle scuff marks and a slightly more matte appearance on the upper surface.
description_view_3: The seam curves across the ball, with minor surface wear and a generally clean appearance.
attribute_stitch_pattern: Two curved, figure-eight seams with evenly spaced red stitches encircle the ball, forming a classic baseball pattern.
attribute_visible_wear_or_scuff_marks: Visible scuff marks and minor discoloration are present on multiple areas of the ball, especially near the seams and central panels.
